title: Sudbury (Northern Ontario) - Canada.ca
content:
## Sudbury Northern Ontario

## Sudbury Northern Ontario
Sudbury is the largest Francophone city in northern Ontario. The community has more than 150 organizations and associations, three quarters of which are Francophone. It is a safe and quiet city with great access to schools and financial, social and health resources.
